div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 347px; margin-left: 781px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
CI/CD Best Practices:
• Security: ECR KMS encryption & Image scanning on push
• Lifecycle: Automatically expire old ECR images (Keep last 20)
• Privileged Mode: Enabled in CodeBuild to build Docker images
• Least Privilege: Isolated IAM roles for CodePipeline & CodeBuild
• Failure Detection: CloudWatch Alarm triggers on pipeline failure
